name: codex-orbit
description: Power-up for Codex: pin, archive, filter, search, and YOLO mode.

codexOrbit.devMode.description: Developer mode: reduces the update poll interval to 60s for rapid testing. Patcher installs still fetch from the authoritative remote.

codexOrbit.reaper.enabled.description: Automatically kills stale Codex native processes whose process tree no longer belongs to a live VS Code window.

codexOrbit.reaper.minAgeMinutes.description: Minimum age before an orphaned Codex native process is eligible for cleanup. Values below 5 are clamped to 5 minutes.

codexOrbit.reaper.intervalMinutes.description: How often Codex Orbit checks for stale Codex native processes.

codexOrbit.reaper.trimResumeSessions.ena.description: Opt-in: trims old, low-CPU resumed Codex native sessions when too many are still running. Keep disabled when long-running chats may be waiting on tools or network.

codexOrbit.reaper.trimResumeSessions.max.description: Maximum number of idle resumed Codex native sessions to keep running.

codexOrbit.reaper.trimResumeSessions.min.description: Minimum age before an idle resumed Codex native session can be trimmed. Values below 5 are clamped to 5 minutes; live resume trimming is opt-in.

codexOrbit.reaper.trimResumeSessions.max.description: Maximum sampled CPU percent for a resumed Codex native session to be considered idle enough to trim.
